name: agentic-setup
description: Oliver Jarvis's Claude Code agentic setup: superpowers, caveman, and no-em-dash, bundled into one marketplace.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, systematic debugging, brainstorming, planning, and collaboration workflows.

plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: Ultra-compressed caveman communication mode. Cuts roughly 75% of tokens while keeping full technical accuracy.

plugins.name: no-em-dash
plugins.description: Never use em-dashes. Ships an invocable skill plus an always-on SessionStart rule.

plugins.name: stack-hooks
plugins.description: Stack-aware lifecycle hooks: auto-format on edit, dangerous-command and secret-file guards, opt-in stop-time typecheck, and a stack-detecting git-hook installer.
